title: Kubernetes Operator Management
system_boundary: Kubernetes / OpenShift Operator Management (Debezium Testing Framework)

actors.name: PlatformEngineer
actors.description: Deploys, scales, configures, and manages Debezium/Strimzi/Apicurio operators on OpenShift

actors.name: OpenShiftCluster
actors.description: Kubernetes/OpenShift API (fabric8 OpenShiftClient) — applies and watches Deployment resources

use_cases.name: Enable Operator
use_cases.detail: Calls setNumberOfReplicas(1) then updateOperator(); waits until deployment is available

use_cases.name: Disable Operator
use_cases.detail: Calls setNumberOfReplicas(0), createOrReplace, then awaits pod list empty (poll 3s, max 30s scaled)

use_cases.name: Scale Connector Replicas
use_cases.detail: Sets operator.getSpec().setReplicas(replicas); shortcut setSingleReplica() uses value 1

use_cases.name: Deploy Image Pull Secret
use_cases.detail: Loads Secret from YAML, calls ocp.secrets().createOrReplace(); links to 'default' and 'builder' service accounts via ocpUtils.linkPullSecret(); then calls setImagePullSecret(secretName)

use_cases.name: Set Image Pull Secret on Deployment
Set Always Pull Policy
use_cases.detail: Iterates all containers in operator spec and sets imagePullPolicy='Always'

use_cases.name: Set Environment Variable
use_cases.detail: Calls ocpUtils.ensureHasEnv(operator, new EnvVar(name, val, null))

use_cases.name: Configure Operand Image Pull Secrets (Strimzi)
use_cases.detail: Sets env var STRIMZI_IMAGE_PULL_SECRETS; unset via unsetOperandImagePullSecrets()

key_classes.name: StrimziOperatorController
key_classes.factory_detail: Finds deployment with prefix 'amq-streams' or 'strimzi' via ocpUtils.deploymentsWithPrefix()

key_classes.name: OpenShiftUtils
key_classes.role: dependency — used for ensureHasPullSecret, ensureHasEnv, ensureNoEnv, linkPullSecret, deploymentsWithPrefix

important_notes: OperatorController is the base abstraction for all operator controllers in the Debezium system-testing framework. It wraps a fabric8 Kubernetes Deployment object and provides lifecycle control (enable/disable = scale 0/1), configuration (env vars, pull secrets, pull policy), and readiness waiting. StrimziOperatorController adds Strimzi-specific env var overrides for operand image pull policy and log level. ApicurioOperatorController adds no extra behavior beyond discovery. Both subclasses use static forProject() factory methods to locate the operator Deployment by name prefix in a given namespace.
